content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/src/lib/auth.ts:1	import { PrismaAdapter } from "@next-auth/prisma-adapter";2	import { NextAuthOptions } from "next-auth";3	import CredentialsProvider from "next-auth/providers/credentials";4	import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";5	import bcrypt from "bcryptjs";6	7	export const authOptions: NextAuthOptions = {8	  adapter: PrismaAdapter(prisma),9	  session: {10	    strategy: "jwt",11	  },12	  pages: {13	    signIn: "/login",14	  },15	  providers: [16	    CredentialsProvider({17	      name: "credentials",18	      credentials: {19	        email: { label: "Email", type: "email" },20	        password: { label: "Password", type: "password" },21	      },22	      async authorize(credentials) {23	        if (!credentials?.email || !credentials?.password) {24	          throw new Error("Invalid credentials");25	        }26	27	        const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({28	          where: {29	            email: credentials.email,30	          },31	        });32	33	        if (!user || !user.password) {34	          throw new Error("Invalid credentials");35	        }36	37	        const isPasswordCorrect = await bcrypt.compare(38	          credentials.password,39	          user.password40	        );41	42	        if (!isPasswordCorrect) {43	          throw new Error("Invalid credentials");44	        }45	46	        return {47	          id: user.id,48	          email: user.email,49	          name: user.name,50	          role: user.role,51	        };52	      },53	    }),54	  ],55	  callbacks: {56	    async jwt({ token, user }) {57	      if (user) {58	        return {59	          ...token,60	          id: user.id,61	          role: (user as any).role,62	        };63	      }64	      return token;65	    },66	    async session({ session, token }) {67	      return {68	        ...session,69	        user: {70	          ...session.user,71	          id: token.id,72	          role: token.role,73	        },74	      };75	    },76	  },77	};
